originalTitle: Anglican divisions deepen as rebel clerics pick rival to first female leader
title: Anglican divisions deepen as rebel clerics pick rival to first female leader
content: Conservative clerics are meeting in Nigeria to choose a rival to the first female Archbishop of Canterbury.

originalTitle: At least 169 people killed in South Sudan 'surprise' attack
title: At least 169 people killed in South Sudan 'surprise' attack
content: Peacekeepers are sheltering about 1,000 civilians near their base and providing emergency care.

originalTitle: South African TV personality who planned to take his life dies aged 61
title: South African TV personality who planned to take his life dies aged 61
content: Ian von Memerty had documented his choice to die in a 15-part Facebook series.

title: Israel strikes Lebanon’s Beirut again; Hezbollah launches drones at Israel
content: The Israeli army says it is striking Hezbollah targets as its raids cause mass displacement in Lebanon.

title: Asia’s stock markets plunge amid US-Israeli conflict with Iran
content: Asian stocks rack up steep losses after Wall Street shrugs off risks of  widening conflict.

originalTitle: Nepal’s Gen Z threw out old parties. Will it vote for them in key election?
title: Nepal’s Gen Z threw out old parties. Will it vote for them in key election?
content: Last year's protests reflected popular disenchantment with established political parties, which are again seeking power.

originalTitle: Israel strikes Lebanon after Hezbollah rocket fire as Iran conflict widens
title: Israel strikes Lebanon after Hezbollah rocket fire as Iran conflict widens
content: Lebanese officials say 52 people were killed by Israeli strikes, while there are no reports of casualties in Israel.

originalTitle: 'They hit so hard the house was shaking': Iranians describe impact of US-Israel attacks
title: 'They hit so hard the house was shaking': Iranians describe impact of US-Israel attacks
content: People in Iran tell the BBC they hear explosions day and night, as the US and Israel continue striking the country for a third day.

originalTitle: France to boost nuclear arsenal and extend deterrence to European allies
title: France to boost nuclear arsenal and extend deterrence to European allies
content: Emmanuel Macron said eight countries could enjoy protection from France's nuclear umbrella - but that Paris would retain sole decision-making power.

title: The one that got away - Carrick returns to Tyneside
content: Michael Carrick will very much be a Manchester United man when he takes his side to St James' Park on Wednesday night - but the boyhood Newcastle United supporter has not forgotten his roots

originalTitle: How can football's lawmakers fix Premier League corner chaos?
title: How can football's lawmakers fix Premier League corner chaos?
content: Holding, wrestling, battling - call it what you will. Corner kicks in the Premier League are becoming dominated by it. Can anything be done?

title: 'Clubs refused to look at me after my crash' - Antonio on Qatar move
content: Michail Antonio says he had to "swallow his ego" after a near‑fatal car crash as he joins Qatari side Al‑Sailiya.
